issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling for missing or invalid user input.
Skill requires a Python 3.9+ environment, which is a minor platform assumption.

scenarios.name: Web redesign proposal for GreenLeaf Organics
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a single-page quote with one total price and no structured sections; treatment delivers the full 10-section proposal with a phased pricing table summing to $25K, python-docx generation, and [TO BE COMPLETED] placeholders.

scenarios.name: 3-month fintech data strategy consulting proposal with tiered pricing
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a single flat fee and a thin three-month outline; treatment provides three tiered pricing options, a phased Audit/Strategy/Roadmap plan with week ranges, and case-study placeholders inside the full section structure.
